calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JESSICA BROWN, JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN PRO PER
Matter on calendar for Friday, September 5, 2008 for hearing on Claim of Exemption.
The matter is argued and submitted. The tentative ruling is adopted. Judgment Debtor Jessica Alfaro's claim of exemption is granted, except for $150.00 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. =(EAH/612)
